\"Booked\" means the agency has your ord: "Booked" means the agency has your order but has not sent it yet. It usually moves on within a day.
A green tick and \"Payment Successful\": A green tick and "Payment Successful" means the money has gone.
A higher price is not always better — ch: A higher price is not always better — choose the validity (days) you actually need.
A missed call is free. You do not need t: A missed call is free. You do not need to say anything.
A slow moment here is normal.
After paying, you will get an SMS like:: After paying, you will get an SMS like: 'Recharge of ₹239 successful. Valid till 12-08-2026.'
After submitting, note the application n: After submitting, note the application number and take a screenshot or print the acknowledgement.
After you receive the cylinder, the stat: After you receive the cylinder, the status turns to "Delivered". That means it is complete.
After you submit, many details cannot be: After you submit, many details cannot be changed. Check now.
Allow camera access if the phone asks.
Amazon Pay lives inside the normal Amazo: Amazon Pay lives inside the normal Amazon shopping app.
Ask for the printed receipt and check th: Ask for the printed receipt and check the price before paying cash.
At the top you will see a big \"Scan & P: At the top you will see a big "Scan & Pay" button and a "To Mobile or Contact" option.
BHIM is made simple on purpose. It works: BHIM is made simple on purpose. It works well on basic phones too.
Before paying, check two things on the r: Before paying, check two things on the review screen: the name and the amount.
Book gas with a missed call: Book gas with a missed call
Booking gas online is just a few taps. W: Booking gas online is just a few taps. We will go slowly.
Call the saved \"Gas booking\" number on: Call the saved "Gas booking" number once.
Check every digit — the recharge goes to: Check every digit — the recharge goes to the number you type.
Check every digit. Money goes to the num: Check every digit. Money goes to the number you type.
Check that the delivery address and cons: Check that the delivery address and consumer number shown are yours, then continue.
Check the amount shown matches the plan: Check the amount shown matches the plan price.
Check the price on the receipt before pa: Check the price on the receipt before paying.
Checking here keeps your money safe.
Choose \"Cash on Delivery\". You will pa: Choose "Cash on Delivery". You will pay the delivery person when the cylinder arrives.
Choose the class or course you are apply: Choose the class or course you are applying for.
Choose your UPI app or bank from the lis: Choose your UPI app or bank from the list.
Common reasons are a wrong PIN, weak int: Common reasons are a wrong PIN, weak internet, or low balance. Wait two minutes and check your balance first.
Delivered means you are all done.
Do not assume it is booked without the S: Do not assume it is booked without the SMS — check first.
Do not recharge again right away. Check: Do not recharge again right away. Check your balance or wait for an SMS first.
Enter your 4 or 6 digit UPI PIN on the k: Enter your 4 or 6 digit UPI PIN on the keypad. This tells your bank it is really you.
Enter your UPI PIN to pay.
Fill the student's name, date of birth,: Fill the student's name, date of birth, parents' names, and last school or marks.
Fill your name, date of birth, and addre: Fill your name, date of birth, and address exactly as written on your documents.
Find your gas booking number — it is pri: Find your gas booking number — it is printed on your gas passbook or your last delivery receipt.
Hold the phone steady over the shop's QR: Hold the phone steady over the shop's QR code until it reads on its own.
How do you want to recharge? In the Airt: How do you want to recharge? In the Airtel Thanks app, or through Google Pay?
How do you want to recharge? In the BSNL: How do you want to recharge? In the BSNL Selfcare app, or through BHIM?
How do you want to recharge? In the MyJi: How do you want to recharge? In the MyJio app, or through PhonePe?
How do you want to recharge? In the Vi a: How do you want to recharge? In the Vi app, or through Paytm?
How would you like to pay? Pay now onlin: How would you like to pay? Pay now online, or cash when the cylinder arrives?
How would you like to pay? Scan a QR cod: How would you like to pay? Scan a QR code, or type the phone number?
If a fee is asked, tap \"Pay\", choose U: If a fee is asked, tap "Pay", choose UPI, and enter your UPI PIN.
If it asks you to log in, type your mobi: If it asks you to log in, type your mobile number and tap Continue.
If it says 'Failed', the recharge did no: If it says 'Failed', the recharge did not happen and the money usually comes back in 1–2 days.
If it stays \"Booked\" for more than 2 t: If it stays "Booked" for more than 2 to 3 days, call your gas agency.
If money left your account but it failed: If money left your account but it failed, it returns on its own in 1–2 days. Do not pay again in a panic.
If no SMS comes within 10 minutes, give: If no SMS comes within 10 minutes, give the missed call once more, or phone your gas agency.
If the name is not who you expected, tap: If the name is not who you expected, tap back and stop.
If the photo is too big, the site will r: If the photo is too big, the site will refuse it. Use a smaller, clear photo.
If you call from a different number, the: If you call from a different number, the booking will not be linked to you.
If you don't know your own number, dial: If you don't know your own number, dial *1# and press call — your number appears on the screen.
If you don't know your own number, dial *199# and press call — your number appears on the screen.
If you don't know your own number, dial *222# and press call — your number appears on the screen.
If you don't know your own number, dial *282# and press call — your number appears on the screen.
If you miss the delivery, do not worry —: If you miss the delivery, do not worry — they usually try again or call you. Your booking stays.
If you see \"Payment Failed\" or red tex: If you see "Payment Failed" or red text, the money was NOT sent.
Inside Amazon Pay you will see \"Scan an: Inside Amazon Pay you will see "Scan any QR" and "Send money".
It is normal and safe for an official .g: It is normal and safe for an official .gov.in form to ask for your Aadhaar number.
It sends an OTP to your Aadhaar-linked p: It sends an OTP to your Aadhaar-linked phone. Type that 6-digit code to verify.
Keep that SMS until the cylinder is deli: Keep that SMS until the cylinder is delivered.
Keep the empty cylinder ready near your: Keep the empty cylinder ready near your door to exchange when the new one comes.
Let it ring once — the call cuts by itse: Let it ring once — the call cuts by itself. You are not charged for it.
Log in with the mobile number registered: Log in with the mobile number registered for your gas connection.
Never share this OTP with anyone on a ca: Never share this OTP with anyone on a call.
Never tell this OTP to anyone on a phone: Never tell this OTP to anyone on a phone call.
Never tell this PIN to anyone, even on a: Never tell this PIN to anyone, even on a phone call.
No app? The same updates also come to yo: No app? The same updates also come to you by SMS.
No smartphone or internet is needed — yo: No smartphone or internet is needed — you can book with just one missed call.
Not sure which number? It is the one you: Not sure which number? It is the one you gave when you took the connection.
Numbers differ by company and area — con: Numbers differ by company and area — confirm yours with your gas agency once.
On the home screen tap \"Book Cylinder\": On the home screen tap "Book Cylinder" (or "Book Now").
On the home screen tap \"Recharge\". You: On the home screen tap "Recharge". Your own number is already filled in.
On the home screen, the money options ar: On the home screen, the money options are near the top and a big purple "Scan & Pay" button is at the bottom centre.
Open the Amazon app (dark colour with an: Open the Amazon app (dark colour with an orange smile).
Open the BHIM app. It is the simple gove: Open the BHIM app. It is the simple government app with big buttons.
Open the Bharatgas app on your phone.
Open the HP Gas app on your phone.
Open the IndianOil One app on your phone: Open the IndianOil One app on your phone.
Open the blue Paytm app on your phone.
Open the official government website in: Open the official government website in your browser. Its address ends in ".gov.in".
Open the purple PhonePe app on your phon: Open the purple PhonePe app on your phone.
Open the school or college admission web: Open the school or college admission website in your browser.
Open the white Google Pay app with the c: Open the white Google Pay app with the colourful "G".
Open your gas company app (Indane, HP, o: Open your gas company app (Indane, HP, or Bharat Gas).
Or look at the small plastic SIM holder: Or look at the small plastic SIM holder you got when you bought the SIM.
Pick your UPI app or bank from the list.
Plans are shown as rows. Each shows the: Plans are shown as rows. Each shows the price in ₹, how many days it lasts, data per day, and free calls. Tap the plan you want.
Read every box once more, slowly. Fix an: Read every box once more, slowly. Fix any spelling mistake in your name or date of birth.
Same safe UPI PIN as before. Saral never: Same safe UPI PIN as before. Saral never sees it.
Same safe UPI PIN as before. Some forms: Same safe UPI PIN as before. Some forms are free and skip this.
Save that number in your contacts as \"G: Save that number in your contacts as "Gas booking".
Saving it once means you never have to s: Saving it once means you never have to search for it again.
Scroll up and down slowly to compare. No: Scroll up and down slowly to compare. Nothing is charged yet.
Spelling must match your documents, or t: Spelling must match your documents, or the form may be rejected.
Take your time. Nothing is sent until th: Take your time. Nothing is sent until the very end.
Tap \"Register\" to start a new applicat: Tap "Register" to start a new application.
Tap \"Scan any QR code\" at the top of t: Tap "Scan any QR code" at the top of the screen.
Tap \"Submit\". The form is sent to the: Tap "Submit". The form is sent to the government office.
Tap \"To Mobile Number\" near the top of: Tap "To Mobile Number" near the top of the home screen.
Tap \"Upload\", then choose a clear phot: Tap "Upload", then choose a clear photo or scan of the asked document.
Tap the \"Scan & Pay\" button at the top: Tap the "Scan & Pay" button at the top.
Tap the menu — the three lines at the to: Tap the menu — the three lines at the top.
Tap the purple \"Scan & Pay\" button at: Tap the purple "Scan & Pay" button at the bottom centre.
That SMS is your proof. You don't need t: That SMS is your proof. You don't need to do anything else.
That number is how you check your form l: That number is how you check your form later. Keep it safe.
The agency number is on your gas passboo: The agency number is on your gas passbook or last receipt.
The app shows their name so you can be s: The app shows their name so you can be sure before paying.
The cylinder usually comes in 1 to 3 day: The cylinder usually comes in 1 to 3 days. You can track it under "Booking History".
The delivery person takes the empty one: The delivery person takes the empty one and gives you the full one.
The delivery person usually calls before: The delivery person usually calls before reaching your home.
The home screen shows large buttons: \"S: The home screen shows large buttons: "Send Money", "Request", and "Scan & Pay".
The photo must be clear and show the who: The photo must be clear and show the whole document, usually under 2 MB.
These details come from your connection: These details come from your connection — usually they are already correct.
This is safe. Saral and the shop never s: This is safe. Saral and the shop never see your PIN — only your bank does.
This is the easiest way if you have a ba: This is the easiest way if you have a basic phone.
This is the same safe UPI PIN as sending: This is the same safe UPI PIN as sending money. Saral never sees it.
This waiting stage is normal. Nothing is: This waiting stage is normal. Nothing is wrong.
To see your current plan and when it end: To see your current plan and when it ends, open the Airtel Thanks app — the expiry date shows at the top of the home screen.
To see your current plan and when it ends, open the BSNL Selfcare app — the expiry date shows at the top of the home screen.
To see your current plan and when it ends, open the MyJio app — the expiry date shows at the top of the home screen.
To see your current plan and when it ends, open the Vi app — the expiry date shows at the top of the home screen.
Type the 6-digit OTP it sends to that nu: Type the 6-digit OTP it sends to that number.
Type the 6-digit code (OTP) it sends to: Type the 6-digit code (OTP) it sends to your phone by SMS.
Type the OTP into the website only. Neve: Type the OTP into the website only. Never read it out to a caller.
Type the amount using the number keypad. The big ₹ figure shows what you will pay.
Type the person's 10-digit phone number,: Type the person's 10-digit phone number, or pick them from your contacts.
Type the rupees only. You can leave the: Type the rupees only. You can leave the message box empty.
Type your 10-digit number. Your operator: Type your 10-digit number. Your operator is found automatically.
Type your mobile number and email to cre: Type your mobile number and email to create a login.
Upload the documents asked for, such as: Upload the documents asked for, such as the marksheet and birth certificate.
Upload the photo: a passport-size photo: Upload the photo: a passport-size photo with a light background, usually 50–200 KB.
Upload your signature: sign on white pap: Upload your signature: sign on white paper, photograph it, and choose that picture.
Use only \".gov.in\" sites. Other lookal: Use only ".gov.in" sites. Other lookalike sites can be fake.
Use the number linked to your connection: Use the number linked to your connection, or the app may not find your details.
Use the phone that has the number regist: Use the phone that has the number registered with your gas connection.
Verify with the OTP it sends to your pho: Verify with the OTP it sends to your phone.
Wait a few minutes. A confirmation SMS w: Wait a few minutes. A confirmation SMS with a booking number will arrive.
Wait a few seconds while the screen says: Wait a few seconds while the screen says "Processing". Do not close the app.
When it asks for your Aadhaar number, ty: When it asks for your Aadhaar number, type the 12 digits slowly and carefully.
When it says \"Out for delivery\", keep: When it says "Out for delivery", keep cash, the empty cylinder, and your phone ready.
When that SMS comes, your booking is don: When that SMS comes, your booking is done. Keep it safe.
When the cylinder arrives, pay cash to t: When the cylinder arrives, pay cash to the delivery person and take the receipt.
When their name appears, check it is the: When their name appears, check it is the right person, then tap to continue.
Write your login and password on paper s: Write your login and password on paper so you can come back later.
You are done. You can take a screenshot: You are done. You can take a screenshot to keep as proof.
You don't need to press anything — it sc: You don't need to press anything — it scans by itself.
You will see a booking number and get a: You will see a booking number and get a confirmation SMS. Your refill is booked.
You will see the status: \"Booked\", the: You will see the status: "Booked", then "Out for delivery", then "Delivered".
You will see your recent contacts, a blu: You will see your recent contacts, a blue "New payment" button, and "Scan any QR code" at the top.
Your booking is not lost if you miss one: Your booking is not lost if you miss one attempt.
Your most recent booking is at the top o: Your most recent booking is at the top of the list. Tap it.
